zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：短期盘整震荡，仍具上行潜力
zh.content:
当前BTC/USD价格位于77202.71美元，较日内高点77332.77美元略低，显示市场短线呈盘整格局。价格紧贴20日SMA(76820.09)，表明多头仍略占优势，但上涨动力有限。短期均线支撑稳固，下方77180附近为关键支撑区域。

MACD指标显示多头动能仍存在，但未提供明确信号，市场可能面临横向整理。若价格突破77350-77400阻力区，将可能触发新一轮上攻。RSI数据缺失，无法确认超买或超卖状态，但从价格行为判断，市场未进入极端波动区域。

短期支撑位关注77180-77185，若跌破可能回测77000整数关口；阻力位在77350-77400及次级77600水平。结合价格与技术指标，多空力量暂时均衡，交易者可考虑低位轻仓布局多单，逢高减仓以控制风险。

操作建议上，保持耐心观望为主，等待明确突破信号。短线交易者可利用支撑区间尝试波段操作，严格设置止损，避免追高。中长线持仓者可在价格稳固SMA上方时逐步加仓，维持风险可控的同时布局潜在上涨行情。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin continues to trade in a narrowly compressed range near 77,200, reflecting a cautious market tone after recent upside momentum slowed. Despite the modest 24-hour decline, price action remains constructive because BTC/USD is still holding above the 20-day simple moving average near 76,820. This suggests buyers are defending medium-term trend support, while the inability to break decisively above 77,330 indicates short-term exhaustion. Momentum remains positive overall, but the market currently lacks strong directional conviction.

The MACD reading remains firmly positive at 214.35, signaling that bullish momentum has not fully disappeared even as price consolidates. However, the absence of a confirmed signal-line crossover and unavailable RSI data reduces visibility on immediate momentum strength. In this environment, traders should focus more heavily on price structure and volatility behavior. A sustained hold above the moving average keeps the broader bullish framework intact, while repeated rejection near the recent intraday high may encourage temporary profit-taking activity among short-term participants.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is forming around 76,800–77,000, closely aligned with the 20-day SMA and recent intraday lows. A break below this zone could expose deeper downside toward 76,200, where stronger dip-buying interest may emerge. On the upside, resistance remains concentrated near 77,350, and a confirmed breakout above that barrier could open the path toward 78,000 and potentially higher psychological targets. Volume expansion during any breakout attempt will be important for confirming directional strength.

For active traders, the current setup favors patience and disciplined risk management rather than aggressive positioning. Momentum traders may look for long entries only after a clean breakout above resistance with confirmation, while conservative participants could wait for retracements closer to support before accumulating exposure. Short-term bearish trades appear less attractive while MACD remains positive, although failure to hold above the moving average would weaken the bullish outlook and increase the probability of a broader corrective move.
